requests.name: create_customer_order
requests.notes: Production-critical mutation. Caller must provide one idempotency_key per intentional submit action. Payment status must remain pending for card/pay sandbox or future-ready methods until payment guardrails are revised.

requests.name: update_merchant_order_status
requests.notes: Production-critical mutation. Caller must provide one idempotency_key per intentional status change. Store membership must be enforced server-side.

monetary_fields_note: All monetary fields (total, subtotal, delivery_fee, item_price) are integer minor money units. VND values are whole dong amounts. currency is 'VND' | 'USD'.
